description: Ship the governance vocabulary in the samples catalog: add the two relation_types and three requires-edge invariants (severity warning, for fresh substrates) to packages/pi-context/samples/conception.json, with CHANGELOG + usage docs, then release. Fresh install/accept-all substrates then carry advisory convention-articulation.
acceptance_criteria: [subagent] samples/conception.json declares the two governance relation_types and three requires-edge invariants at severity warning.
[orchestrator] A fresh install/accept-all substrate carries the vocabulary; context-validate WARNS (does not error) on an unarticulated planning artifact.
[orchestrator] CHANGELOG [Unreleased] + usage docs updated; build + check + full test suite green.
